ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity or weather station collecting the data */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain or location where the data was collected */,
  "conditions_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather conditions (e.g., rain, overcast) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level at the time of data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of data collection */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation at the time of data collection */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover at the time of data collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the week the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_conditions_id FOREIGN KEY ("conditions_id") REFERENCES conditions ("conditions_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_day FOREIGN KEY ("day") REFERENCES days ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity or weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the entity */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain or location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the domain */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the domain */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the domain */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the domain */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the domain */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "conditions_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "conditions_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather condition (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the weather condition (e.g., minimal, significant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conditions_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_levels" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity level */,
  "humidity_level" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the humidity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities_conditions" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "conditions_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id", "conditions_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains_conditions" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain */,
  "conditions_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id", "conditions_id")
)
